CAT17-043.headline: Ageism and Social Exclusion
CAT17-043.subtitle: The mental health impact
CAT17-043.figureLine: A single elder-postured clay figure stands slightly apart at the edge, shoulders drawn inward and turned away, conveying the quiet ache of being overlooked.
CAT17-043.sceneLine: A wide ring of soft light teal forms encircles a clearing while one pale teal seat sits empty just outside it, suggesting a person gently left beyond the circle.

CAT19-033.headline: Incarcerated Men's Mental Health
CAT19-033.subtitle: Inside the prison system
CAT19-033.figureLine: A single seated clay figure sits low with knees gathered and head bowed, posture contained and still, conveying confinement carried quietly within.
CAT19-033.sceneLine: A series of evenly spaced upright pale teal lines stands before the figure with one soft light teal gap opening between them, suggesting walls that still leave room for breath.

CAT19-034.headline: LGBTQ+ Men and Minority Stress
CAT19-034.subtitle: Mental health disparities and resilience
CAT19-034.figureLine: A single standing clay figure holds itself upright with one hand pressed steady to its own chest, posture composed under unseen weight, conveying quiet endurance.
CAT19-034.sceneLine: A faint lattice of soft light teal lines presses inward around the figure while a brighter teal accent thread holds firm down its center, suggesting steadiness amid constant pressure.

CAT19-035.headline: Men of Color and Mental Health
CAT19-035.subtitle: Intersecting stigmas and care
CAT19-035.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands tall with both arms folded protectively, posture guarded yet rooted, conveying dignity held against layered burdens.
CAT19-035.sceneLine: Two overlapping rings of teal accent and soft light teal cross over the figure, their shared shadow deepest where they meet, suggesting stigmas that compound where they intersect.

CAT19-036.headline: Rural Men's Mental Health
CAT19-036.subtitle: The crisis of geographic isolation
CAT19-036.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands alone in open space, arms at its sides and gaze fixed at a distant point, conveying the long quiet of being far from anyone.
CAT19-036.sceneLine: A vast flat plain stretches outward in pale teal with one faint soft light teal path threading toward a far horizon, suggesting distance between a person and the help they need.

CAT19-039.headline: Blue-Collar Men's Mental Health
CAT19-039.subtitle: The culture of silence
CAT19-039.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands solid with one hand half-raised toward its mouth then stilled, posture strong but holding something back, conveying words swallowed before spoken.
CAT19-039.sceneLine: A heavy pale teal weight rests on the figure's shoulders while a single soft light teal thread loosens at its collar, suggesting silence beginning to give way.

CAT19-048.headline: Barbershop Mental Health Outreach
CAT19-048.subtitle: Reaching men where they are
CAT19-048.figureLine: Two clay figures sit side by side at ease, one leaning slightly toward the other in unhurried conversation, conveying trust built in an everyday gathering place.
CAT19-048.sceneLine: A warm circle of soft light teal light pools around two simple seats with a pale teal arc curving above, suggesting an ordinary room turned into a place of care.

CAT19-049.headline: Sports-Based Mental Health Programs
CAT19-049.subtitle: Supporting boys and men through play
CAT19-049.figureLine: Three clay figures stand close in a loose half-circle, shoulders nearly touching and bodies leaning inward, conveying belonging found in shared effort.
CAT19-049.sceneLine: A single soft light teal sphere rests at the center of the figures' circle with pale teal arcs radiating outward, suggesting connection formed through play and team.

CAT20-045.headline: The Spoonie Community
CAT20-045.subtitle: Chronic illness peer support
CAT20-045.figureLine: Two clay figures sit close, one resting its head against the other's steady shoulder, postures tired yet held, conveying strength shared when energy is scarce.
CAT20-045.sceneLine: A small cluster of soft light teal forms passes gently from one figure toward the other, with a pale teal glow held carefully between their hands, suggesting limited reserves shared with care.
